message:
fix(scripts): address bugs found during code review

- query-ga4-funnel.ts: Fix lesson funnel loop to start at 0 (lessons are 0-19, not 1-20)
- query-ga4-funnel.ts: Handle "(not set)" dimension values with safeParseInt helper
- debug-ga4-events.ts: Add try/catch error handling to listAllEvents and checkPageViews
- configure-ga4.ts: Remove duplicate time_on_step_seconds from dimensions (already a metric)
